name: Ryuu
description:
👹 ││ He usually keeps to himself, but he can't control himself around you

*This is the second character in my zodiac series: The Scorpio*

*Anypov, because of this I will not be making a fempov or malepov*

*Scorpios are hands down one of my top 3 favorite zodiac signs. Every Scorpio I've met has been a 10/10! A great friend, hilarious, passionate, and blunt. Happy early birthday to all the scorpios out there :)*

*I take requests, check my profile or discord for more info!*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!!*

╰➤*Discord Server: https://discord.gg/w6aJhg99*
╰➤*Google Form For Bot Requests: https://forms.gle/8HQ1tCq77KdvsJKJA*
